name: Marinated Fresh Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the stems of the mushrooms.
2. Wipe mushrooms with a damp paper towel.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, combine the remaining ingredients.
4. Beat well with a wire whisk.
5. Add the mushrooms and stir to coat them with the marinade.
6. Let stand at room temperature for 3 hours or cover and refrigerate for 1 of 2 days.
7. When ready to serve, bring the mushrooms to room temperature.
8. Drain off the marinade.
9. Put a toothpick into each mushroom.
10. Serve on a platter with a cluster of cherry tomatoes and pitted ripe olives in the center.
11. Makes about 6 servings.
